title: Kaadhal Kudil Song Lyrics Bairavaa
stanzas:
Koala pulliyaai naangal
anbo azhagu vari neetti mudikkum
vaana patchiyaai naangal
kilaiyo ilai asaithu vaazhthi anuppum

kadhal kudilil
kaatrum inaindhidum.
vinmeen irangi
veettil vilakkidum.
naavil padalum
vaarthai anaindhidum.
vizhiyin asaivil
yaavum vilangidum.

thooya thiravam engal thalaithoda
thooram thaandiyum thelikkum
naalai sooriyan azhum kavidhaiyil
engal peyargalum irukkum

aezhaiyin vayitril
irangiya unavu
ivaipol sumandhom
engalin kanavu
kaigalai kuvithu
kanavugal serpom
saemitha thuliyil
nilavugal paarpom.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Kaadhal Kudil song?

The song beautifully captures the theme of love and romance, highlighting the emotional connection between two people.

Who composed the music for Bairavaa?

The music for Bairavaa was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

What is the significance of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a romantic sequence, emphasizing the bond between the lead characters.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kaadhal Kudil?

The lyrics were penned by Vivek.

When was the movie Bairavaa released?

The movie was released in the year 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaadhal Kudil from the movie Bairavaa is a romantic melody that beautifully portrays the essence of love. Set against a soothing musical backdrop by Santhosh Narayanan, the lyrics by Vivek evoke emotions of warmth and connection. The song is featured during a pivotal romantic scene, enhancing the chemistry between the lead characters. Its melodious tune and heartfelt words make it a favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kaadhal Kudil from the movie Bairavaa. With Santhosh Narayanan's soothing composition and Vivek's heartfelt lyrics, this song beautifully captures the essence of love. Dive into a romantic journey that resonates with every heartbeat.
stanzaMeanings: Like a koala, we extend lines of love and beauty. Like a bird in the sky, we send greetings by moving branches and leaves.
In the house of love, the wind joins together. Stars come down to light up the home. Songs and words blend on the tongue. Everything is understood with the movement of the eyes.
Pure liquid touches our heads, crossing distances. In tomorrow's sunlit poem, our names will be there.
Flowers that fall in worship, a doll held by a child.
We carry food that reaches the stomach of the poor, like our dreams. We join hands to gather dreams and see the moonlight in the drops we collect.
